response.overview: It tells the story of Kak Aspalela, a seller of Nasi Beriani Gam who is loved by many. Every Ramadan, her biryani rice is very popular and highly sought after in TTDI. However, her daughters, Ukisha, Umaya and Ulala are very lazy to help her at the stall. They are more interested in selling cosmetic products. One day Kak Aspalela pretends to lose her memory. To save their mother's stall business, Kak Aspalela's daughters are forced to learn how to cook Nasi Beriani Gam according to their mother's recipe. Will they succeed in saving their mother's business?
response.title: Beriani Gam Kak Aspalela
